"Don't count the days; make the days count." — Muhammad Ali
"I hated every minute of training, but I said, don't quit." — Muhammad Ali
"A champion is someone who gets up when he can't." — Jack Dempsey
"The more I train, the more I convince myself I can do it." — George Foreman
"Discipline is doing what you hate, but doing it like you love it." — Mike Tyson
"I've failed over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed." — Michael Jordan
"Some people want it to happen, some wish it would happen, others make it happen." — Michael Jordan
"Everything negative is an opportunity to rise." — Kobe Bryant
"Rest at the end, not in the middle." — Kobe Bryant
"Hard work beats talent when talent fails to work hard." — Kevin Durant
"I've got a theory that if you give one hundred percent all the time, somehow things will work out." — Larry Bird
"You can't get much done in life if you only work on the days you feel good." — Jerry West
"Good, better, best. Never let it rest until your good is better and your better is best." — Tim Duncan
"Success is no accident. It is hard work, perseverance, learning, sacrifice." — Pelé
"Talent without working hard is nothing." — Cristiano Ronaldo
"Your love makes me strong. Your hate makes me unstoppable." — Cristiano Ronaldo
"You have to fight to reach your dream. You have to sacrifice and work hard for it." — Lionel Messi
"I start early and I stay late, day after day, year after year." — Lionel Messi
"When people succeed, it is because of hard work. Luck has little to do with success." — Pelé
"Today I will do what others won't, so tomorrow I can do what others can't." — Jerry Rice
"Pressure is a privilege." — Billie Jean King
"You have to believe in yourself when no one else does." — Serena Williams
"I really think a champion is defined not by their wins but by how they recover." — Serena Williams
"If you don't practice you don't deserve to win." — Andre Agassi
"No human is limited." — Eliud Kipchoge
"Only the disciplined ones in life are free." — Eliud Kipchoge
"We all have dreams. But in order to make dreams come into reality, it takes determination." — Jesse Owens
"You can't put a limit on anything. The more you dream, the farther you get." — Michael Phelps
"If you want to be the best, you have to do things others aren't willing to do." — Michael Phelps
"Pain is temporary. Quitting lasts forever." — Lance Armstrong
"The miracle isn't that I finished. The miracle is that I had the courage to start." — John Bingham
"Everything is reps and mileage." — Arnold Schwarzenegger
"The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow." — Arnold Schwarzenegger
"The real workout starts when you want to stop." — Ronnie Coleman
"One more rep." — Ronnie Coleman
"The iron never lies to you." — Henry Rollins
"Winning isn't everything, but wanting to win is." — Vince Lombardi
"It's not whether you get knocked down; it's whether you get up." — Vince Lombardi
"Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do." — John Wooden
"Success comes from knowing that you did your best to become the best." — John Wooden
"Ability is what you're capable of doing. Motivation determines what you do." — Lou Holtz
"If you're bored with life, you don't have enough goals." — Lou Holtz
"The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra." — Jimmy Johnson
"The harder you work, the luckier you get." — Gary Player
"Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can." — Arthur Ashe
"It's hard to beat a person who never gives up." — Babe Ruth
"I am building a fire, and every day I train, I add more fuel." — Mia Hamm
"True champions aren't always the ones that win, but those with the most guts." — Mia Hamm
"Persistence can change failure into extraordinary achievement." — Marv Levy
"Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there." — Bo Jackson
"It is not the mountain we conquer, but ourselves." — Edmund Hillary
"Victory is in having done your best. If you've done your best, you've won." — Billy Bowerman
"Be water, my friend." — Bruce Lee
"The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus." — Bruce Lee
"Today is victory over yourself of yesterday." — Miyamoto Musashi
"Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard." — Tim Notke
"When you want to succeed as bad as you want to breathe, then you'll be successful." — Ray Lewis
"Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live." — Jack LaLanne
"Exercise is king. Nutrition is queen. Put them together and you've got a kingdom." — Jack LaLanne
"Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment." — Dan Gable
"Blood, sweat, and respect. The first two you give. The last you earn." — Dwayne Johnson
"Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency." — Dwayne Johnson
"The only bad workout is the one that didn't happen." — Bear Bryant
"Sore today, strong tomorrow." — Lou Ferrigno
"Train insane or remain the same." — Greg Plitt
"Excuses don't burn calories." — Jillian Michaels
"Fall seven times, stand up eight." — Naoya Inoue
"Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit. You are what you repeatedly do." — Shaquille O'Neal
"Age is no barrier. It's a limitation you put on your mind." — Jackie Joyner-Kersee
"You can't win unless you learn how to lose." — Kareem Abdul-Jabbar
"The more I practice, the luckier I get." — Gary Player
"Motivation gets you started. Habit keeps you going." — Jim Ryun
"The clock is ticking. Are you becoming the person you want to be?" — Greg Plitt
"It always seems impossible until it's done." — Roger Bannister
"I never lose. I either win or learn." — Conor McGregor
"Sweat is fat crying." — Jillian Michaels
"Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done." — David Goggins
"Suffering is the true test of life." — David Goggins
"What hurts today makes you stronger tomorrow." — Jay Cutler
"It never gets easier. You just get stronger." — CT Fletcher
"Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you." — Rich Froning
"Results happen over time, not overnight. Work hard, stay consistent." — Kayla Itsines
"Your body can stand almost anything. It's your mind you have to convince." — Laird Hamilton
"Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction." — Les Mills
"Don't wish for it. Work for it." — Eva Shockey
"Strive for progress, not perfection." — Tony Horton
"I lifted the weight; the weight did not lift me." — Naim Süleymanoğlu
"A nation that does not produce champions cannot be a great nation." — Naim Süleymanoğlu
"The barbell does not know who you are; it only knows if you lift it." — Halil Mutlu
"I sacrificed my youth for these medals." — Halil Mutlu
"Discipline always beats talent when talent forgets to work." — Fatih Terim
"Go all in every single day; half effort gives half results." — Fatih Terim
"Every step in training builds who you become." — Yasemin Can
"I trained for my country, my flag, and my people." — Yasemin Can
"Results are built in training, not on the day you are tested." — Yağız Sabuncuoğlu
"Every hard session is a step toward who you want to be." — Yağız Sabuncuoğlu
"I gave everything in every session; that is my pride." — Hakan Şükür
"Hard training taught me that giving up is not an option." — Taha Akgül
"Gold is forged in sweat, not in dreams alone." — Taha Akgül
"My father's discipline became my strength." — Hamza Yerlikaya
"Legends are built through years of unseen work." — Hamza Yerlikaya
"Focus without discipline is wasted energy." — Kenan Sofuoğlu
"Precision comes from patience and daily repetition." — Kenan Sofuoğlu
"Patience and precision are built rep by rep." — Semih Saygıner
"Every focused session builds the champion in you." — Semih Saygıner
"I carry my country on my shoulders in every effort." — Nurcan Taylan
"Hesitation costs you everything when it matters." — Nurcan Taylan
